responseMessageContents.text: The user wants me to show the credential input widget so they can provide their credentials. Let me use requestEnvs.
Here's the credential box — input your tokens and I'll use them to finish the deploy end-to-end.

envs.name: IVX_OWNER_TOKEN
envs.description: IVX owner bearer token used to authenticate protected /api/ivx/* endpoints (owner-AI, senior-developer, dashboards).

envs.name: IVX_OWNER_EMAIL
envs.description: Registered owner email paired with the owner token for owner-authenticated requests.

envs.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
envs.description: GitHub personal access token with repo scope for ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest. Used to push commits and read the latest SHA.

envs.name: RENDER_API_KEY
envs.description: Render API key used to trigger deploys and fetch service status for api.ivxholding.com.

envs.name: RENDER_SERVICE_ID
envs.description: Render service ID for the ivx-owner-ai-backend service (srv-...).

envs.name: SUPABASE_URL
envs.description: Supabase project URL used by the backend for persistent storage.

envs.name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
envs.description: Supabase service-role key for backend admin operations.
